#region VEXcode Generated Robot Configuration
from vex import *
import urandom
import math

# Brain should be defined by default
brain=Brain()

# Robot configuration code
brain_inertial = Inertial()
rightmotor = Motor(Ports.PORT12, False)
leftmotor = Motor(Ports.PORT6, True)
BeamLift_motor_a = Motor(Ports.PORT10, True)
BeamLift_motor_b = Motor(Ports.PORT4, False)
BeamLift = MotorGroup(BeamLift_motor_a, BeamLift_motor_b)
PinLift_motor_a = Motor(Ports.PORT5, True)
PinLift_motor_b = Motor(Ports.PORT11, False)
PinLift = MotorGroup(PinLift_motor_a, PinLift_motor_b)
controller = Controller()
pneumatic_9 = Pneumatic(Ports.PORT9)
touchled_8 = Touchled(Ports.PORT8)
pneumatic_3 = Pneumatic(Ports.PORT3)
optical_2 = Optical(Ports.PORT2)
distance_7 = Distance(Ports.PORT7)
distance_1 = Distance(Ports.PORT1)



# generating and setting random seed
def initializeRandomSeed():
    wait(100, MSEC)
    xaxis = brain_inertial.acceleration(XAXIS) * 1000
    yaxis = brain_inertial.acceleration(YAXIS) * 1000
    zaxis = brain_inertial.acceleration(ZAXIS) * 1000
    systemTime = brain.timer.system() * 100
    urandom.seed(int(xaxis + yaxis + zaxis + systemTime)) 
    
# Initialize random seed 
initializeRandomSeed()


# Color to String Helper
def convert_color_to_string(col):
    if col == Color.RED:
        return "red"
    if col == Color.GREEN:
        return "green"
    if col == Color.BLUE:
        return "blue"
    if col == Color.WHITE:
        return "white"
    if col == Color.YELLOW:
        return "yellow"
    if col == Color.ORANGE:
        return "orange"
    if col == Color.PURPLE:
        return "purple"
    if col == Color.CYAN:
        return "cyan"
    if col == Color.RED_VIOLET:
        return "red_violet"
    if col == Color.VIOLET:
        return "violet"
    if col == Color.BLUE_VIOLET:
        return "blue_violet"
    if col == Color.BLUE_GREEN:
        return "blue_green"
    if col == Color.YELLOW_GREEN:
        return "yellow_green"
    if col == Color.YELLOW_ORANGE:
        return "yellow_orange"
    if col == Color.RED_ORANGE:
        return "red_orange"
    if col == Color.BLACK:
        return "black"
    if col == Color.TRANSPARENT:
        return "transparent"
    return ""

#endregion VEXcode Generated Robot Configuration

current_time = 0
leftSpeed = 0
rightSpeed = 0
gyro = 0

def initial():

def turn_distance(distances):
    global leftSpeed, rightSpeed, gyro
    leftDistances = distances * 3
    rightDistances = distances * -3
    leftmotor.spin_for(FORWARD, leftDistances, DEGREES, wait = False)
    rightmotor.spin_for(FORWARD, rightDistances, DEGREES, wait = True)

def GyroTurn(target, kp, second):
    global leftSpeed, rightSpeed, gyro
    if kp == 'angle':
        target = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES) + target
        kp = 1.2
    leftmotor.spin(FORWARD)
    rightmotor.spin(FORWARD)
    final_time = brain.timer.time(SECONDS) + second
    while not (brain.timer.time(SECONDS) > final_time):
        print(brain.timer.time(SECONDS))
        gyro = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES)
        rightSpeed = (gyro- target) * kp 
        leftSpeed = (gyro - target) * kp * -1
        rightmotor.set_velocity(((gyro- target) * kp ), PERCENT)
        leftmotor.set_velocity(((gyro - target) * kp * -1), PERCENT)
        wait(20, MSEC)
    leftmotor.stop()
    rightmotor.stop()
    leftSpeed = 0
    rightSpeed = 0
    wait(0.3, SECONDS)

def gyro_forward_distance(power, target, distances, breakk, kp):
    global leftSpeed, rightSpeed, gyro
    if target == 'same':
        target = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES)
    leftmotor.set_position(0, DEGREES)
    rightmotor.set_position(0, DEGREES)
    leftmotor.spin(FORWARD)
    rightmotor.spin(FORWARD)
    while math.fabs(rightmotor.position(DEGREES) + leftmotor.position(DEGREES)) < distances:
        gyro = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES)
        rightSpeed = (power + ((gyro - target) * kp))
        leftSpeed = (power - ((gyro - target) * kp))
        leftmotor.set_velocity(leftSpeed,PERCENT)
        rightmotor.set_velocity(rightSpeed,PERCENT)
    if breakk:
        leftmotor.stop()
        rightmotor.stop()
        leftSpeed = 0
        rightSpeed = 0
        wait(0.3, SECONDS)

def gyro_forward_second(power, target, Second, Break, kp):
    global leftSpeed, rightSpeed, time_now, gyro
    rightmotor.spin(FORWARD)
    leftmotor.spin(FORWARD)
    if target == 'same':
        target = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES)
    final_time = brain.timer.time(SECONDS) + Second
    while not brain.timer.time(SECONDS) > final_time:
        gyro = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES)
        # print('gyro:', gyro)
        rightSpeed = (power + ((gyro - target) * kp))
        leftSpeed = (power - ((gyro - target) * kp))
        leftmotor.set_velocity(leftSpeed, PERCENT)
        rightmotor.set_velocity(rightSpeed, PERCENT)
    if Break:
        rightmotor.stop()
        leftmotor.stop()
        leftSpeed = 0
        rightSpeed = 0
        wait(0.3, SECONDS)

def timer_count():
    global leftSpeed, rightSpeed, gyro, current_time, end_time
    wait(1.5,SECONDS)
    gyro = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES)
    adjest_angle = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES)
    current_time = brain.timer.time(SECONDS)
    wait(0.5,SECONDS)
    adjest_time = current_time + 0.5
    adjest_angle = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES) - adjest_angle
    while True:
        current_time = brain.timer.time(SECONDS)
        if current_time > adjest_time:
            brain_inertial.set_rotation(brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES) - adjest_angle, DEGREES)
            adjest_time = current_time + 0.5
        gyro = brain_inertial.rotation(DEGREES)
        wait(0.02,SECONDS)
        optical = optical_2.brightness()
        dis_7 = distance_7.object_distance(MM)
        print('time', current_time, 'L_S:', leftSpeed, 'R_s:', rightSpeed, 'gyro', gyro, 'optical',optical, 'distance', dis_7)

def start():
    startTime = brain.timer.time(SECONDS)
    touchled_8.set_color(Color.RED)
    brain_inertial.set_heading(0, DEGREES)
    brain_inertial.set_rotation(0, DEGREES)

initial()
wait(1, SECONDS)
touchled_8.pressed(start)
